## Summary

Describe the behavior changed and why it belongs in the current milestone.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Relevant manual or end-to-end checks

## Contract Impact

- [ ] No database, API, permission, configuration, deployment, or license contract changed
- [ ] Related documentation and migration notes are included

## DCO

- [ ] Every commit includes a `Signed-off-by` line created with `git commit -s`
